Beille 2pk Non Scratch Coconut Plant Based Dish Sponge Kitchen Tools (2 Styles)

Plant based. Food safe. Plastic free. Fully compostable. 100% natural composition. Biodegradable. Need we say more? If you’re looking for green cleaning supplies, look no further than Beille’s Non Scratch 100% Natural Fiber and Coconut Plant Based Dish Sponges.

Tackle your dishwashing tasks with the power of nature. Made from 100% natural fibers and coconut, these dish sponges provide a sustainable alternative to traditional synthetic sponges. Designed for heavy duty scrubbing, they effectively remove grease, grime and food particles without damaging your cookware, dishware or countertops.

Key Features

  • PLANT BASED DISH SPONGE: Choose from a traditional dish sponge shape or modern leaf shape, these all natural, non scratch, plant based dishwashing sponges from Beille are tough on grease but easy on dishes, cookware, counters and more
  • SUSTAINABLE PRODUCTS: Made from 100% natural fibers and coconut, these dishwashing sponges provide a sustainable and biodegradable alternative to traditional synthetic sponges; these dishwashing sponges will quickly become kitchen essentials and are food safe and plastic free
  • ODOR FREE DISHWASHING SPONGE: The coarse texture of the coconut and natural fibers offers excellent scrubbing power, while the natural material ensures a longer lasting sponge that resists unwanted odors and left behind build up; fully compostable
  • CLEANING SUPPLIES: Safe for all dishware, counters, cookware, baking supplies and more, take on even the grimiest of messes, these dishwashing sponges can handle it! Say goodbye to plastic and embrace a greener, more sustainable way to clean
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.25 x 2.5 x 0.75 inches; Weight: 0.08lbs; Colors; White/Brown

The coarse texture of the coconut fibers offers excellent scrubbing power, while the natural material ensures a tougher, more durable, longer lasting sponge that resists odors and unwanted build up. Gentle on surfaces but tough on dirt, these sponges are perfect for all your dishwashing, cleaning and scrubbing needs. And, once your sponge is worn out, it can be composted, returning nutrients to the earth and not contributing landfill waste.

Beille’s 100% natural dishwashing sponges are a small change that makes a big difference! Say goodbye to plastic and embrace a greener, more sustainable way to clean.

Choose from a traditional rectangular shape or modern leaf shape. Sold in packs of two.
